mapper.sql: id, blogger_name, avatar, intro, github_url, email, about_content, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE website_info
blogger_name = #{bloggerName}, avatar = #{avatar}, intro = #{intro}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, email = #{email}, about_content = #{aboutContent}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE website_info SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM website_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM website_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM website_info
is_deleted = 0 AND blogger_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{websiteInfo.bloggerName}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC
